title: OPINION: Speaking up on subsistence, even in the face of an industrial juggernaut
summary: This opinion piece was written by Seth Kantner and was originally published by Anchorage Daily News on April 29, 2022. This spring along the river, I heard from friends that construction on the proposed Ambler Industrial Road had started. Rumor said bulldozers were plowing toward our villages. This is not correct. The Biden administration proposed to suspend the project right-of-way permits, to review them. Federal leaders acknowledged that there must be more tribal consultation. It is true that the Alaska Industrial Development and Export Authority is attempting to push forward, to...
